permission_groups.name: DRP Owners
permission_groups.description: Full control over site, libraries, lists, and permissions

permission_groups.name: DRP Editors
permission_groups.description: Can upload documents, fill metadata, and edit own files

permission_groups.name: DRP Reviewers
permission_groups.description: Can read all content and edit metadata (not delete files). Reviews metadata quality.

permission_groups.name: DRP Readers
permission_groups.description: Read access to publicly visible documents only

permission_groups.name: DRP Auditors
permission_groups.description: Read access to all content including restricted libraries

permission_groups.name: DRP AI Service Account
permission_groups.description: Read-only access for future Microsoft Graph integration. No write, no delete.

permission_groups.name: Project Owners
permission_groups.description: Read access to project-specific documents via project-filtered views
